oshi.software.common.os.unix.freebsd.FreeBsdOSProcess.PsThreadColumns

Packages that use FreeBsdOSProcess.PsThreadColumns
Package
Description
oshi.software.common.os.unix.freebsd
Provides abstract base classes and pure-Java implementations for the FreeBSD operating system, shared by the JNA and FFM modules.

    FreeBsdOSProcess.PsThreadColumns
    Columns requested from ps -awwxo when enumerating threads.
